summary: Tested Anonymous Reality Phase 1 end-to-end. Backend: 23/23 pytest tests passed. Frontend: 8 rooms render with quoted seed previews + house rules + handle badge; chat room renders seeded messages, composer with correct placeholder, blocked notice, supportive self-harm system reply, working Rules drawer; admin Moderation Desk renders all 4 tabs with metrics, transcript with [seed]/[BLOCKED · toxicity]/[BLOCKED · doxxing] tags and per-message REMOVE buttons; landing teaser navigates to /anonymous-reality. One UI defect: status pill stays at 'CONNECTING…' indefinitely — it never transitions to 'Polling' or 'Live' even though messages ARE being fetched (active_count updates from 0 → 8) — fallback flag in useAnonymousChat hook is not propagated to the pill label.

ui_bugs.issue: Pill remains 'CONNECTING…' forever even though polling is clearly working (active_count and new messages update correctly). Hook never flips its connection-state to 'polling' or 'live' in the UI. WebSocket appears unreachable through ingress in this preview env (expected per agent_to_agent_context_note), but the polling fallback should drive the label to 'Polling • N here'.
ui_bugs.selector: [data-testid='status-pill'] (or the pill in <header> showing 'CONNECTING… • N HERE')

action_items: Fix useAnonymousChat.js so when WebSocket connection fails twice and polling kicks in, the exposed connection-state ('connecting' | 'live' | 'polling') is updated to 'polling' so the pill label shows 'Polling • N here' instead of indefinite 'Connecting…'. Likewise once the WS hello frame is received, set state to 'live'.
critical_code_review_comments: anonymous.py L322: the 'no since + no msgs' fallback fetches descending then reverses — but the prior query already includes seeds (moderation_status=allowed includes seeds). The fallback query is identical to the primary; the 'since' guard above already guarantees we never hit this branch with seeds present. Dead-ish code but harmless.

anonymous_moderation.py L91: the `if raw.startswith('json')` block strips `json` prefix but does NOT also strip a leading code-fence backtick, then calls json.loads. Because L89 already does .strip('`'), works for `​```json\n{...}\n```​` cases. Acceptable.

anonymous.py: rate-limit counts ALL messages (including blocked/system) by session in last 60s for cap of 12. A user repeatedly posting blocked content will hit the 429 — desirable, but blocked attempts are also persisted then counted. Document this if intentional.

anonymous.py admin_metrics: `block_rate_pct = blocked / (total_messages + blocked)` but `total_messages` already counts user-type messages including allowed; blocked messages are also user-type, so they're double-counted in denominator. Should be `blocked / max(1, total_user_messages)` where total_user_messages includes both allowed+blocked, OR exclude blocked from `total_messages`. Current 23.8% in admin desk for 16 user msgs / 5 blocked is mathematically wrong (5/(16+5)=23.8% but real rate is 5/16=31.3%). LOW priority but visible to admins.

success_rate.frontend: 92% — all functional flows pass; status pill state-machine bug is the only UI defect

seed_data_creation: None new — backend's ensure_rooms_and_seed() already populates 8 rooms with 4-5 seeded messages each. Tests created throwaway anonymous sessions via random X-Device-Id headers and posted user messages into Loneliness room.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_anonymous_reality.py covers session create/idempotent/me, rooms list + detail + seeds, clean+toxic+doxxing+self-harm moderation including system message verification, self-report 400, cross-user reports, track allow/reject, polling-since filter, admin RBAC, metrics, reports list (hydrated), flagged, transcript (seed+user+blocked), remove, freeze/unfreeze/423, ban/403. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_anonymous_reality.py -v. Frontend: status pill never flips out of 'Connecting…' — messages still flow via polling so it's a state-label bug only. WebSocket is unreachable through preview ingress as expected.
rca of the issue: Status pill stuck at 'CONNECTING…': useAnonymousChat.js opens a WebSocket; on failure it should retry twice then engage long-polling fallback AND update an exposed `mode` (connecting|live|polling) state. Evidence that polling works: (1) active_count badge updates from 0→8 over ~12s, (2) seeded + user messages render. Evidence that label never transitions: pill text remained 'CONNECTING…' across 16s of waiting (8 polling intervals at 2s each). Likely fix: in the hook, after the WS upgrade fails and the polling interval is started, setMode('polling'); also after the first successful poll response, setMode('polling') if not already 'live'. On WS hello frame setMode('live').
